note: Advisory sandbox linter. CHECK_OK/ISSUES vocab, never PASS.
title: Sandbox-registry gate-profile linter
what_it_proves: each sandbox row has sandbox_id + deploy_root the gate reads; real registry CHECK_OK exit 0
gate_profile keys constrained to what apply_sandbox_profile reads; unknown key = typo flagged
seeded row missing deploy_root -> caught (would KeyError the gate); wrong-typed value caught
chess_patches_applied: exits nonzero on any issue; RED-before-GREEN via canary
